name: Streusel Cream Cheese Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. For the batter, cream together the margarine and sugar until smooth.
3. Add eggs and beat well after mixing in the dry ingredients of flour, baking powder, and salt until combined.
4. Pour two-thirds of the batter into a flat-bottomed springform pan.
5. Blend the cream cheese filling with the egg, sugar, vanilla extract until smooth.
6. Spread evenly over the batter layer.
7. Pour the remaining batter on top of the cheesecake mixture.
8. Mix together the streusel topping ingredients to form coarse crumbs.
9. Sprinkle the streusel topping evenly over the cheesecake.
10. Bake for 45 minutes, or until set and golden brown.
